working_on.task: Completed separation of main_frame.py into 4 independent views.
working_on.notes: Module is currently stable. NotebookLM login and fetches operate smoothly.

pending_tasks.notes: Pyre lint checking still shows type checking errors for missing CustomTkinter modules, despite it running successfully in Python 3.12.

recent_changes.description: Split ui/main_frame.py into functional sub-views to reduce cyclic complexity from 708 lines to 200.
Patched uv runtime execution mapping to bypass the NLM executable shim. Fixed Windows legacy rich console Unicode errors.

errors_encountered.solution: App.py callbacks updated to specifically target `self._main_frame.nlm_view.nlm_switch`.

decisions_made.reason: Allows easier navigation and debugging over the giant MainFrame object

decisions_made.decision: Directly execute Python with the sys.executable module target rather than nlm.exe
decisions_made.reason: Prevents the package executable wrapper from failing gracefully when standard I/O unicode streams collapse.
